rules.displayPlacements: Show the same question in every declared group placement if placements overlap.
rules.samplingDeduplication: Deduplicate by questionId when drawing questions across groups.
rules.simulatedTestScoring: Calculate points at runtime from test total and selected question weights.
rules.rawScoreNormalization: sourceMeta.rawScore defaults to 5, converts 0 or <=5 to 5, and preserves source score values greater than 5.
